name: Filen WebDAV
description: Filen WebDAV exposes your Filen cloud storage as a standard WebDAV endpoint running in proxy mode. Each WebDAV client authenticates with their own Filen credentials — no credentials are stored on the container. Any WebDAV-compatible client — including Finder, Windows Explorer, rclone, and Infuse — can mount the share directly.

notes.text: Each WebDAV client authenticates with their own Filen email and password. No credentials are stored on the container.
HTTPS is not enabled by default. Place a reverse proxy (nginx, Caddy, or NPM) in front if the server is reachable from outside your LAN.
